test-method.name: LoginPageTitleTest
test-method.description: TC_LOGIN_001 : Verify the page title matches expected.

test-method.name: LoginPageUrlTest
test-method.description: TC_LOGIN_002 :Verify the Login Page URL matches the expected.

test-method.name: verifyLoginHeadertextTest
test-method.description: TC_LOGIN_005 : Verify that the Login header is displayed on the login page.

test-method.name: verifyUsernameAndPasswordFieldsTest
test-method.description: TC_LOGIN_006: Verify Username and Password fields is display and Enable.

exception.message: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//*[text()='Sign Up']"} (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.153) For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#no-such-element-exception Build info: version: '4.27.0', revision: 'd6e718d134' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.8' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [8050a0f17783cf1e72327658b8596af6, findElement {using=xpath, value=//*[text()='Sign Up']}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 146.0.7680.153, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 146.0.7680.165 (4b989da09e1..., userDataDir: C:\Users\DINESH~1\AppData\L...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:51285}, goog:processID: 28532, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:51285/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 146.0.7680.153, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 8050a0f17783cf1e72327658b8596af6

exception.message: expected [Invalid username or password] but found [Invalid username or password. You have one Attempt remaining. Click on forgot password to get your username or password]

exception.message: Unexpected toast message: Your Account has been blocked. Please contact system administrator or wait 24 hours. expected [true] but found [false]
